action.reasoning: Observation: eval failed because predict.py got 'STGCN.__init__() missing 1 required positional argument: adj_mx'. Analysis: training code (train.py) saves model_kwargs without 'adj_mx', so when predict.py loads the saved model_kwargs (which exist but lack adj_mx), it fails. Decision: fix predict.py to ensure adj_mx is added to model_kwargs if missing, and also update train.py to save adj_mx in model_kwargs for future. Then resubmit eval for best.pt (from iter 6) to get the real mae_60min score.
